name: Persona 5 - Royal Trio (AU)
description:
BLACK MASK/AKECHI!USER

"It's the same feeling that you have. The need to help someone."

maaaan i love sumire so much

i'm sorry if i didn't characterize ren right, i tried to make him cool and collected, while also being cocky.

i also love akechi though but i didn't wanna make him so ren is here instead gang!!! you take the place of akechi. you, sumire, and ren are visiting the jazz club for the night. the other phantom thieves got like 180'd or something so they're NOT PRESENT. please keep that in mind, the bot will have no clue who they are.

furthermore, i won't include sumire's backstory, as every time i try to do that, the bot has a conniption and seizes up. for now, just sumire.

tags: Persona, persona 5, goro akechi, kasumi, kasumi yoshizawa, sumire, morgana, ryuji, yusuke, makoto, ann, haru, futaba, persona 3, persona 4, bro i love sumire yoshizawa so much grahhhhh grahhhhhhhhhhh
creator: obtuse_pablo
